close_reason: BackendRegistration and WritableBackendRegistration closures are 3 lines each; extracting a helper adds indirection for minimal dedup
description:
src/lib.rs:245-260 — both inventory::submit! blocks call DopplerBackend::from_uri(uri) and only differ in the trait-object cast on success. Pattern is duplicated across every backend in this workspace.

Possible improvements:
  - A small private helper `fn factory(uri: &str) -> Result<DopplerBackend, SecretError> { Self::from_uri(uri) }` and call it from both factories. Negligible benefit because each closure is one line.
  - A workspace-level macro `secretx_backend!(DopplerBackend, "doppler");` that emits both inventory::submit! blocks. Reduces boilerplate but adds macro indirection. Sibling backends would benefit.

This is an opinion-tier finding — current code is correct and clear. Filed for traceability if the workspace ever consolidates backend boilerplate.
title: BackendRegistration and WritableBackendRegistration submit the same factory body — extract helper
